customer_issue: Users cannot log into the Salesforce application after a recent configuration change.
expected_root_cause: Login configuration, user access, or authentication settings issue
expected_troubleshooting: Check user status, login history, authentication settings, and recent changes.

customer_issue: An external integration receives invalid_grant errors when requesting new access tokens.
expected_root_cause: OAuth token expiration, revoked refresh token, or connected app configuration issue
expected_troubleshooting: Validate connected app settings, refresh token status, scopes, and reauthorize integration.
search_terms: external integration invalid_grant errors requesting new access tokens

customer_issue: A third-party application calling Salesforce REST API receives 401 unauthorized responses.
expected_root_cause: Invalid credentials, expired token, or incorrect API permissions
expected_troubleshooting: Verify authentication headers, OAuth flow, user permissions, and API access.
search_terms: api integration oauth authentication 401 unauthorized token third-party

customer_issue: A user cannot see a Lightning component that other users can access.
expected_root_cause: Lightning page assignment, permission, or component visibility rules
expected_troubleshooting: Check Lightning page activation, profiles, permission sets, and visibility filters.
search_terms: user cannot see Lightning component other users can access

customer_issue: A custom Apex trigger fails during record creation with an unexpected exception.
expected_root_cause: Apex logic error, governor limit, or data validation failure
expected_troubleshooting: Review debug logs, Apex exceptions, trigger logic, and related automation.

customer_issue: A user cannot edit records they should have access to.
expected_root_cause: Missing permission set, profile permissions, sharing rules, or record access issue
expected_troubleshooting: Review object permissions, field access, sharing rules, and role hierarchy.
search_terms:
Insufficient Privileges
You do not have sufficient privileges to access this record.

customer_issue: A Salesforce Flow fails when a user updates a record.
expected_root_cause: Flow fault path, missing permissions, invalid data, or automation conflict
expected_troubleshooting: Check Flow error details, debug runs, user permissions, and related automation.
search_terms: flow failed to execute unhandled fault has occurred in this flow

customer_issue: Customer data is no longer syncing between Salesforce and an external system.
expected_root_cause: Integration authentication failure, API issue, or mapping problem
expected_troubleshooting: Check integration logs, API status, credentials, field mappings, and recent changes.
search_terms: integration, sync failure, data not syncing, external system, api failure, rest api, middleware, webhook, batch job, connector

customer_issue: Users receive SAML authentication errors after an identity provider certificate rotation.
expected_root_cause: SAML metadata mismatch or expired certificate
expected_troubleshooting: Validate identity provider metadata, Salesforce SSO settings, certificates, and SAML responses.

customer_issue: Users cannot login after certificate update
search_terms: SAML Assertion Signature Invalid Unable to validate SAML assertion
api integration oauth authentication 401 unauthorized  token INVALID_ASSERTION_CONSUMER_SERVICE

expected_root_cause: Record access or sharing configuration issue
search_terms: INSUFFICIENT_ACCESS_OR_READONLY Insufficient Privileges do not have sufficient privileges to access this record
